markdown:
#  Do I need to use cost codes on a bid form? 
##  Background 
Generally, line items on a bid form have a cost code for each item. However, there might be situations where you don't want or need to use cost codes.
##  Answer 
No. If you don't want to use cost codes for bid line items, you can add general items with the 'Plain Text' field instead. See [Create a Bid Form](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/bidding-project/tutorials/create-a-bid-form).
![Add Line Item Plain Text](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/10f3c6f9b7d8a807ff6af5d5af2ccfb9/aa94cfba16e745609df6c042091ffe8c/add-line-item-plain-text.png?fm=webp)
Instead of selecting a cost code, you'll be able to enter a subject in the Items colum.
![Plain Text Item](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/bfcdb95aa42712b80fceac51f33e690a/02d5c229555e55f079dad74f931e9e43/plain-text-item.png?fm=webp)

title: Do I need to use cost codes on a bid form?
description: You can add general items to a bid form by using a plain text field instead of a cost code.
